caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or interview titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as evidenced by the mannequins dressed in clothing and racks of garments in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, looking slightly to his side, suggesting he might be listening to someone off-camera or responding to a question. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, indicative of a conversational format.
